title: Silky Smooth Korean Beef Brisket Kalguksu
description: A nutty and silky Korean dish featuring beef brisket, perfect for a date night, this ayurvedic-sattvic-friendly kalguksu is a must try. It is made with lardons-render for added flavor.
instructions: In a large pot, heat the sesame oil over medium heat and add the rendered lardons.
Add the sliced beef brisket and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the soy sauce and cook for 1 minute, until the beef is coated.
Add the kalguksu noodles and cook according to the package instructions.
Stir in the chopped green onions and cook for 1 minute, until wilted.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve the beef and noodles in a bowl and garnish with additional green onions, if desired.
